description: An aerodynamics engineer needs to prepare the baseline eCRM-001 model for a high-lift landing CFD analysis. The clean cruise model is located at /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM001_cruise.vsp3. Open this model in OpenVSP and reconfigure it for approach/landing by deploying wing flaps and trimming the horizontal tail. Specifically: 1) Select the main Wing component, go to the 'Sub' (Subsurface) tab, add a new Subsurface, change its type to 'Flap', and set its Angle to 35.0 degrees. 2) Select the Horizontal Tail component, go to the 'XForm' tab, and adjust its Pitch (Y rotation) to -3.0 degrees to trim the nose-down moment. 3) Save the modified model as /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM001_landing.vsp3.
